intro: Between April 12 and 19, 2026, ZCyberNews published 12 articles on credential theft, with APT41, Omnistealer, and TeamPCP identified as the primary threat actors. The reporting, which includes nine high-severity and one critical incident, details targeting across the technology, cloud-services, logistics, manufacturing, and medium-business sectors. Affected regions span Europe, North America, Turkey, and globally. This concentration of high-severity alerts underscores a focused campaign against corporate access points during this period.
